title: schedonorus quadridens
intro: Schedonorus quadridens, also known as Timothy grass or Phleum pratense, is a type of perennial grass native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Timothy grass include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory health, as well as its potential to act as an adaptogen to help the body adapt to stress. Timothy grass is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
